title: Executive on the Park
architect: Dys Architecture and Ryznar Media Inc
description: An exclusive 8-storey concrete building in the heart of West Vancouver. Executive on the Park offers 68 luxury residences with 1 to 3 bedroom configurations, featuring 24hr concierge service, bike room, green space, and a resident's lounge.

title: Hue
address: 2025 Saint Johns Street, Port Moody, BC
description: A 6-storey Marcon development in Port Moody offering 222 modern condo residences with 1 to 3 bedrooms. Located along Saint Johns Street with excellent transit and outdoor recreation access.

title: Elmwood
description: A stunning 38-storey Marcon tower designed by Shift Architecture in Coquitlam. Elmwood features 335 residences with 1 to 3 bedrooms and modern amenities — estimated completion 2026.

title: Frame
address: Kingsway and Earles Street, Vancouver, BC
description: A 10-storey concrete development at Kingsway and Earles Street in Vancouver East offering 217 units. Near Norquay Park, shops, restaurants, and Metrotown.

title: Templeton
address: Templeton Drive and East 1st Avenue, Vancouver, BC
description: Wood-frame residences near Vancouver's vibrant Commercial Drive. 1, 2, and 3 bedroom condos and townhomes surrounded by restaurants, coffee shops, and local services.

title: Artesia
address: Grange Street and Halley Avenue, Burnaby, BC
description: A 31-storey concrete tower near Metrotown Skytrain Station offering 247 residences with premium amenities including concierge, gym, co-working, EV parking, and guest suite.

title: Moody Yards
description: Wood-frame condos on Murray Street in Port Moody. Near Rocky Point Park, Yellow Dog Brewing, Sasamat Lake, and Port Moody Skytrain Station. Features BBQ area, co-working space, and outdoor fitness.

title: Boden
address: Oak Street and West 52nd Avenue, Vancouver, BC
description: Wood-frame townhomes near Oakridge Skytrain Station, Oakridge Mall, and Langara Golf Course. 2 and 3 bedroom residences in Vancouver's desirable Oakridge neighbourhood.
